conferences.name: International Workshop on Privacy Engineering
conferences.description: Focused privacy engineering venue, co-located with IEEE EuroS&P 2026.
conferences.notes: Strong fit for engineering, requirements, DPIA, PET integration, compliance tooling.

conferences.name: Annual Privacy Forum
conferences.description: Interdisciplinary European privacy and data protection forum connecting research, policy, and practice.
conferences.notes: Community event, not only technical; especially relevant locally for Salzburg.

conferences.name: Privacy and Data Governance Symposium
conferences.description: Policy, regulation, compliance, and technology event with a scientific paper track.
conferences.notes: Community and governance oriented; useful for privacy regulation and compliance work.

conferences.name: Computers, Privacy and Data Protection
conferences.description: Major multidisciplinary privacy, data protection, and digital rights conference.
conferences.notes: More legal/policy/community than classic CS proceedings, but very relevant for privacy groups.

conferences.name: Symposium on Usable Privacy and Security
conferences.description: Primary venue for human-centered usable privacy and security research.
conferences.notes: HCI-driven; posters/workshops had later 2026 deadlines than technical papers.

conferences.name: Privacy Enhancing Technologies Symposium / Proceedings on Privacy Enhancing Technologies
conferences.description: Premier privacy-enhancing technologies venue with four yearly PoPETs submission issues.
conferences.notes: Crypto/privacy-heavy; four issue deadlines per volume. 2027 issue dates follow the official quarterly PoPETs pattern; replace with the official CFP 2027 URL when published.

conferences.name: IEEE European Symposium on Security and Privacy
conferences.description: European flagship IEEE venue for security and privacy research.
conferences.notes: Main 2026 deadline is closed; useful to track for the 2027 cycle.

conferences.name: IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy
conferences.description: Flagship IEEE security and privacy research conference.
conferences.notes: Very crypto/security-heavy and highly selective; two annual submission cycles.

conferences.name: IFIP Summer School on Privacy and Identity Management
conferences.description: Privacy and identity management summer school, especially useful for PhD researchers.
conferences.notes: Full paper deadline is 2026-07-31; revised full paper deadline is 2026-09-25.

conferences.name: International Workshop on Data Privacy Management
conferences.description: Workshop series on data privacy management, often relevant for privacy policy and assurance work.
conferences.notes: No current 2026 CFP found during seeding; keep as a manual follow-up item.

conferences.name: USENIX Security Symposium
conferences.description: Top venue for systems, network, software, and applied security and privacy.
conferences.notes: Multiple cycles in many years; monitor current CFP for next volume.

conferences.name: Network and Distributed System Security Symposium
conferences.description: Top practical network and distributed systems security venue.
conferences.notes: Two review cycles; good for networked privacy/security systems.

conferences.name: ACM Conference on Computer and Communications Security
conferences.description: ACM SIGSAC flagship conference for computer and communications security.
conferences.notes: Cycle B abstract deadline is 2026-04-22; full paper deadline is 2026-04-29.

conferences.name: ACM Asia Conference on Computer and Communications Security
conferences.description: Strong ACM venue for real-world security and privacy research.
conferences.notes: Two submission rounds; useful alternative to CCS/NDSS/USENIX/S&P.

conferences.name: International Symposium on Research in Attacks, Intrusions and Defenses
conferences.description: Security venue focused on attacks, intrusions, defenses, malware, and measurement.
conferences.notes: Good fit for empirical security, threat measurement, and defense papers.

conferences.name: Annual Computer Security Applications Conference
conferences.description: Applied security conference with privacy, usable security, CPS/IoT, and real-world security topics.
conferences.notes: Hard topic theme for 2026 includes security and privacy of agentic systems.

conferences.name: IEEE Computer Security Foundations Symposium
conferences.description: Foundational security and privacy venue for rigorous models, proofs, protocols, and formal analysis.
conferences.notes: Rolling yearly deadlines; good for formal privacy/security work.

conferences.name: New Security Paradigms Workshop
conferences.description: Small, discussion-heavy workshop for unconventional security and privacy ideas.
conferences.notes: Great for early, critical, socio-technical, or paradigm-shifting work.

conferences.name: IEEE International Conference on Smart Grid Communications, Control and Computing Technologies
conferences.description: Smart grid communications venue with a dedicated Privacy and Security symposium track.
conferences.notes: High relevance for smart grids, energy systems, privacy, security, and CPS. The official page renders dates in a way the simple checker misreads, so keep this manual for now.

conferences.name: ACM International Conference on Future and Sustainable Energy Systems
conferences.description: Energy-systems computing venue that explicitly includes privacy, cybersecurity, and smart-grid resilience.
conferences.notes: Good non-security-core venue for smart grid privacy/security work. The site blocks the simple checker, so verify manually or add a custom checker later.

conferences.name: IEEE International Conference on Intelligence and Security Informatics
conferences.description: Security informatics venue with current emphasis on AI, cybersecurity, and responsible/security challenges.
conferences.notes: Relevant if the group works on AI security, responsible AI, or security analytics.

conferences.name: Applied Cryptography and Network Security
conferences.description: Applied cryptography, cybersecurity, network security, and privacy conference with real-world emphasis.
conferences.notes: Good fit for applied crypto, privacy protocols, and network security work.

conferences.name: European Symposium on Research in Computer Security
conferences.description: European computer security research venue with security, privacy, usable security, and socio-technical scope.
conferences.notes: Good European venue for privacy/security work, especially usable and human-centered topics in 2026.

conferences.name: IEEE Secure Development Conference
conferences.description: Venue focused on methods, tools, and experience for building secure systems.
conferences.notes: Potentially useful for privacy engineering tooling and secure-by-design work.

conferences.name: ACM/IEEE Symposium on Edge Computing
conferences.description: Edge computing venue relevant for IoT, distributed infrastructure, smart energy, and security/privacy systems.
conferences.notes: Not a pure security venue, but relevant for IoT/edge/energy security and privacy systems.

conferences.name: Financial Cryptography and Data Security
conferences.description: Cryptography, security, privacy, blockchain, and financial systems security venue.
conferences.notes: Good for applied crypto, PETs, blockchain, DeFi, electronic payments, and security economics.

conferences.name: Advances in Financial Technologies
conferences.description: Financial technologies venue for digital currencies, blockchains, DeFi, and security analysis.
conferences.notes: Useful if the group touches blockchain, cryptographic finance, or decentralized systems.

conferences.name: International Workshop on Cryptocurrencies and Blockchain Technology
conferences.description: ESORICS-affiliated workshop on cryptocurrencies, blockchain technology, privacy, and security.
conferences.notes: Good smaller venue for blockchain privacy/security papers. The page lists month/day deadlines without years, so keep this manual for now.

conferences.name: ACM Conference on Data and Application Security and Privacy
conferences.description: ACM venue for data security, application security, privacy, access control, and policy work.
conferences.notes: Good fit for privacy and data/application security papers.

conferences.name: ACM Conference on Security and Privacy in Wireless and Mobile Networks
conferences.description: Security and privacy venue for wireless, mobile, IoT, and cyber-physical systems.
conferences.notes: Highly relevant for IoT, mobile privacy, location privacy, and wireless security.

conferences.name: IEEE Conference on Communications and Network Security
conferences.description: IEEE communications-oriented security venue for network, mobile, wireless, and communications security.
conferences.notes: Good for network and communications security/privacy work.

conferences.name: IFIP TC11 Information Security and Privacy Conference
conferences.description: IFIP flagship information security and privacy conference with broad security, privacy, and ICT scope.
conferences.notes: Good broad security/privacy venue, including privacy-by-design, IoT security, and critical infrastructure.

conferences.name: Australasian Conference on Information Security and Privacy
conferences.description: Security and privacy conference covering cryptology, privacy, software security, forensics, and network security.
conferences.notes: Good Australasian security/privacy venue with crypto, privacy, and CPS/security tracks.

conferences.name: IFIP Networking Conference
conferences.description: Networking venue with relevant network security, IoT, autonomous networking, and energy-efficient networking topics.
conferences.notes: Not a pure security venue, but useful for networked privacy/security systems and IoT work.

conferences.name: International Conference on Network and Service Management
conferences.description: Network and service management venue relevant for security management, IoT, cloud, and resilient infrastructure.
conferences.notes: Useful for systems/security management and networked infrastructure work.

conferences.name: IEEE International Conference on Blockchain and Cryptocurrency
conferences.description: IEEE blockchain and cryptocurrency venue covering security, privacy, smart contracts, DeFi, and blockchain for IoT/CPS.
conferences.notes: Good crypto/security venue for blockchain, smart contracts, DeFi, and privacy work.

conferences.name: ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
conferences.description: Top HCI venue; relevant for usable privacy/security and human-centered data protection work.
conferences.notes: Not a security venue, but can be excellent for user-facing privacy/security research.
